violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Observed raw eggs stored above the croissants in the walk in cooler.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. No test strips at the time of inspection.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Observed boxes of food on floor of walk in freezer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Observed dried food on vent hood and underside of shelf above vent hood over stove.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
